name: secure-enterprise-messenger
description: Secure internal communication platform with E2EE messaging

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -s first --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:clean: pkill -f 'backend/node_modules/.bin/tsx watch' || true && pkill -f 'tsx/dist/loader.mjs src/server.ts' || true && pkill -f 'frontend/node_modules/.bin/vite --host' || true
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:all
scripts.dev:embedded: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:backend:embedded
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist backend/dist frontend/dist node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules
